query: SELECT name, linkedinUsername, COUNT(*) as count FROM linkedin_influencers GROUP BY name, linkedinUsername HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY count DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user Zd6KbRY6RwQkGBw.e73eeb1704d6 --database MHgbg38edqPMmynmo4KzJ4 --execute SELECT name, linkedinUsername, COUNT(*) as count FROM linkedin_influencers GROUP BY name, linkedinUsername HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY count DESC;
